core_mechanism: deformation of an associative product by a bilinear pairing implemented through a Hopf-algebra coproduct (Cliffordization), which recasts the re-ordering of non-commuting factors as a single closed-form algebraic product-twist identity summing over all pairwise contractions
brief_reason: The abstract turns Wick re-ordering into a Hopf algebraic identity 'Cliffordization' via the Rota-Stein combinatorial formula, i.e. a coproduct-driven bilinear deformation of the product that yields closed algebraic expressions.
